sharing.title: Email invitation from referrers
sharing.description: Sent to referee when referrer invites via email.

gift.title: Discount confirmation (after entering email)
gift.description: Sent to referee after entering email, including reward coupon code.

cash_payout.title: Cash payout notification
cash_payout.description: Sent to referrer when referral cash reward has been paid out.

success_reward.title: Successful rewards
success_reward.description: Sent to referrer when earning a reward from a successful referral.

referral_pending.title: Pending rewards
referral_pending.description: Sent to referrer when earning a reward that is pending approval.

referral_denied.title: Decline rewards
referral_denied.description: Sent to referrer when referral reward is declined.

not_enough_refer.title: Not enough referees to receive reward
not_enough_refer.description: Sent to referrer when a referral is successful but has not reached the required referral number for a reward.

invite.title: Welcome to referral program
invite.description: Sent to customers when joining the referral program, including personal referral link and reward details.

reward_expiry.title: Reward expiry reminder
reward_expiry.description: Sent to referrer 3 days before discount code expires if it hasn't been used.

reward_expiry_referee.description: Sent to referee 3 days before discount code expires if it hasn't been used.

reward_referee.description: Sent to referee if discount code has not been used within 7 days.

reward_referrer.description: Sent to referrer if discount code has not been used within 7 days.

remind_referrer_refer.title: Remind referrer to refer
remind_referrer_refer.description: Sent to referrer if not perform a referral 7 days after joining.

image.hint:
Accepts .jpeg and .png format
File must be smaller than 20MB and 20MP
Recommends 1200px x 704px size
